{{Quote|We're the heavy hitters. When you need a command bridge leveled or a convoy of tanks wiped out, the K-wings get the call.|New Republic pilot Miranda Doni shortly before the Battle of Doornik-319|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels">''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref>}}
'''Miranda Doni''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] with the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

==Biography==
[[File:Miranda_Doni_K-Wing_XWM.png|thumb|left|270px|Miranda Doni piloting her K-wing starfighter.]]
Assigned to the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]] as a [[BTL-S8 K-wing assault starfighter|K-wing]] pilot, she relished their role as "heavy hitters" and was a competitor for the position of [[Commander/Legends|commander]] within her [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]]. At some point, she and her K-Wing managed to enter combat with a TIE fighter over a forested planet, where she managed to destroy the TIE pursuing her via the K-Wing's turrets shooting behind. During the failed [[Battle of Doornik-319|blockade of Doornik-319]], Doni pulled out of her bombing run when she heard the pleas of [[Yevetha]]n prisoners that had been broadcast on an open channel. In the subsequent counterattack, Doni and a number of other exposed K-wing pilots were [[Death/Legends|killed]] when their craft were shot down.
